title: Fermented Crunchy Romantic British Oatmeal Crumble
description: A fermented oatmeal crumble infused with dum for a touch of sweetness and crunch, vegetarian-friendly for the modern romantic dinner.

ingredients.name: 1/2 cup fresh or frozen dumberries (or any fruit suitable for fermentation, e.g., raspberries)
1/4 cup maple syrup or agave nectar (or any sweetener suitable for fermentation)

instructions: Mix rolled oats, salt, apple cider vinegar in a bowl. Slowly add coconut oil and maple syrup while stirring until you have a crumb mixture.
Add fresh or frozen dumberries into the oat mixture, ensuring each dumberry is well coated with the oat mixture.
Line an 8x8 inch baking dish with parchment paper for easy removal of the cake afterwards. Spoon the oat mixture evenly over the lined dish.
Bake for about 20 minutes until golden brown and set.
In a saucepan, heat cinnamon to desired level of fermentation (follow instructions based on type of fruit used).
Remove from oven when it's ready. Top the crumble with the heated cinnamon mixture.
